title: acer obtusatum var. ibericum
intro: Acer obtusatum var. ibericum, also known as the Iberian maple, is a variety of the Acer obtusatum tree, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Acer obtusatum var. ibericum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
